front.title: Agent Authorization use cases and gap analysis

abstract.t: This document provides a systematic analysis of these emerging agent- based use cases. It categorizes them into distinct scenarios, details their specific authorization requirements, and performs a comprehensive gap analysis against the existing OAuth 2.0 framework [RFC6749] and its common extensions. The analysis identifies fundamental mismatches, the goal of this document is to articulate these gaps clearly, providing a foundation for future work on new extensions within the OAuth Working Group to address the authorization needs of the next generation of ai agents.
